input.raw_input: We need a HIPAA-compliant patient scheduling portal for a regional clinic network. Patients view lab results, book/reschedule appointments, message providers, and request refills. Staff manage availability and review messages. ~25 screens across 4 roles (patient, provider, billing admin, scheduler). Integrations: Epic EHR via FHIR, Stripe billing, Twilio SMS reminders, Okta SSO. Responsive web only.

parsed_context.summary: HIPAA patient scheduling portal with EHR, billing, SMS, and SSO integrations.

expected_output: A UCP-based discovery estimate that reflects 25 screens, 4 roles, and 4 integrations; calls out HIPAA compliance discovery work; produces both AI-assisted and manual-only hour ranges with sane PERT ordering; surfaces gaps (e.g. exact FHIR resource scope, audit requirements) and assumptions; confidence and role-hours present.
notes: Discovery twin uses UCP. Targets are a Sonnet-regime drift-detection baseline (median of 3 fresh harness runs), NOT the outline's hand-tuned worked numbers — recalibrated because the old targets came from a richer-context Opus + pre-band-change regime.

input.raw_input: We need a HIPAA-compliant patient scheduling portal for a regional clinic network. Patients view lab results, book/reschedule appointments, message providers, and request refills. Staff manage availability and review messages. ~25 screens across 4 roles. Integrations: Epic EHR via FHIR, Stripe billing, Twilio SMS, Okta SSO. Responsive web only.

parsed_context.summary: HIPAA patient scheduling portal, 25 screens, 4 roles.

expected_output: A UX/design estimate (SCP-style) scaled to ~25 responsive screens and 4 distinct user roles; accounts for accessibility needs typical of healthcare; both scenario hour ranges; design-system / wireframe assumptions; role-hours weighted toward product + ui_ux.
notes: UX twin (SCP). Targets are a Sonnet-regime drift-detection baseline (median of 3 fresh harness runs), NOT the outline's hand-tuned worked numbers — recalibrated because the old targets came from a richer-context Opus + pre-band-change regime.

input.raw_input: HIPAA patient scheduling portal. 25 screens, 4 roles, integrations: Epic FHIR, Stripe, Twilio, Okta. Responsive web. Greenfield build with an agentic AI coding workflow.

expected_output: A COCOMO II development estimate sized to 4 integrations + 25 screens on greenfield; AI-assisted hours meaningfully below manual-only given agentic tooling, but within the reduction guardrail; SLOC/effort breakdown; integration-risk gaps; role-hours present for both scenarios.
notes: Development twin uses COCOMO II. Targets are a Sonnet-regime drift-detection baseline (median of 3 fresh harness runs), NOT the outline's hand-tuned worked numbers — recalibrated because the old targets came from a richer-context Opus + pre-band-change regime.

input.raw_input: HIPAA patient scheduling portal. Greenfield, agentic dev + agentic review tooling. Security-sensitive (PHI). 4 integrations.

expected_output: A Fagan-inspection code-review estimate that scales review/rework hours to the dev volume and elevates rigor for PHI/security-sensitive code; both scenario ranges; review-rate and rework breakdown; junior reviewers capped; role-hours present.
notes: Code review twin uses Fagan. Targets are a Monte-Carlo-regime median baseline. The prompt now anchors KSLOC to objective scope signals (screens/integrations/project-type), which collapsed the twin's run-to-run spread from ~50% to ~12% — so this is now a stable target, not just advisory drift detection.

input.raw_input: HIPAA patient scheduling portal. Needs secure cloud deployment, audit logging, encrypted PHI storage, CI/CD. Integrations with Epic FHIR, Stripe, Twilio, Okta.

parsed_context.summary: Regulated deployment with audit + encryption needs.

expected_output: A CMP-style deployment/DevOps estimate covering CI/CD, infra-as-code, secure PHI storage, audit logging and the four integration deploy paths; both scenario ranges; compliance/infra gaps; role-hours weighted to engineering + devops (>=75%).
notes: Deployment twin uses CMP; engineering+devops+data >= 75%. Targets are a Sonnet-regime drift-detection baseline (median of 3 fresh harness runs), NOT the outline's hand-tuned worked numbers — recalibrated because the old targets came from a richer-context Opus + pre-band-change regime.

input.raw_input: HIPAA patient scheduling portal. 25 screens, 4 roles, 4 integrations. Needs functional, integration, security, and accessibility testing. PHI in scope.

expected_output: A TPA-based QA estimate scaled to 25 screens + 4 integrations with extra weight for security/accessibility/compliance testing; both scenario ranges; test-coverage breakdown; gaps on test-data + environments; role-hours present.
notes: QA twin uses TPA. No accuracy target: the outline gives no clean QA worked mid (the ~1,177 on line 2837 is a derived project sum, not a single twin worked example), so estimate_accuracy SKIPS this case.

input.raw_input: Build a fintech KYC onboarding app for a digital bank. New customers complete identity verification, document upload, sanctions/PEP screening, and risk scoring before account opening. ~18 screens, 3 roles (applicant, compliance reviewer, ops admin). Integrations: Persona (IDV), Plaid (bank linking), a sanctions-screening API, and an internal core-banking API. SOC 2 and PCI-DSS in scope.

parsed_context.summary: Digital-bank KYC onboarding with IDV, sanctions screening, and risk scoring.

expected_output: A UCP discovery estimate reflecting 18 screens, 3 roles, and 4 KYC/compliance integrations; calls out SOC 2 + PCI-DSS discovery; both scenario ranges with valid PERT ordering; gaps around sanctions-list cadence and risk-scoring rules; role-hours present.

input.raw_input: Fintech KYC onboarding app. 18 screens, 3 roles. Multi-step identity-verification wizard with document capture, plus a compliance-reviewer queue UI. Trust + clarity are critical.

expected_output: A UX estimate scaled to ~18 screens with weight for a multi-step IDV wizard and a reviewer-queue interface; trust/error-state design; both scenario ranges; role-hours weighted to product + ui_ux.

input.raw_input: Fintech KYC onboarding app, greenfield, agentic AI coding. 18 screens, 4 integrations (Persona, Plaid, sanctions API, core-banking). Risk-scoring engine plus async screening workflows.

parsed_context.summary: KYC app with risk engine + async screening.

expected_output: A COCOMO II development estimate sized to 4 integrations + a risk-scoring engine + async workflows; AI-assisted below manual within the guardrail; SLOC/effort breakdown; integration + compliance gaps; role-hours present for both scenarios.

input.raw_input: Fintech KYC onboarding app. Greenfield, agentic dev + agentic review. Handles PII and payment data; SOC 2 + PCI-DSS. Risk-scoring logic must be reviewed carefully.

expected_output: A Fagan code-review estimate elevating rigor for payment/PII and risk-scoring code; review-rate + rework breakdown; junior reviewers capped; both scenario ranges; role-hours present.

input.raw_input: Fintech KYC onboarding app. Secure cloud deploy, PCI-DSS scope, audit logging, secrets management, CI/CD, async-screening worker infra. Integrations with Persona, Plaid, sanctions API, core-banking.

parsed_context.summary: PCI-scoped deploy with worker infra + audit.

expected_output: A CMP deployment estimate covering CI/CD, PCI-scoped infra, secrets management, audit logging, worker infrastructure and four integration deploy paths; both scenario ranges; role-hours weighted to engineering + devops (>=75%).

input.raw_input: Fintech KYC onboarding app. 18 screens, 4 integrations. Needs functional, integration, security, and compliance testing, plus validation of risk-scoring outcomes. PII + payment data in scope.

expected_output: A TPA QA estimate scaled to 18 screens + 4 integrations with extra weight for security/compliance and risk-scoring validation; test-coverage breakdown; gaps on test data + sandbox environments; both scenario ranges; role-hours present.
